mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_album_proposal (user_id, status, start_date, end_date, prompt, content_json, model) VALUES (#{userId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{prompt}, #{contentJson}, #{model})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ai_album_proposal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND proposal_id = #{proposalId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ai_album_proposal WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND proposal_id = #{proposalId}
